headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 16, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals secured a thrilling 8-7 victory over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Marcell Ozuna's home run and three RBIs. Meanwhile, the San Francisco Giants shut out the Cincinnati Reds 3-0 behind Landen Roupp's strong pitching performance.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, with the Detroit Tigers placing third baseman Zach McKinstry on the 10-day injured list due to left hip and abdominal inflammation. The Houston Astros transferred Josh Hader to the 60-day injured list with left biceps tendinitis, while the Chicago Cubs placed Daniel Palencia on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a trade with the Baltimore Orioles, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in exchange for RHP Axel Perez. The Washington Nationals also made a trade with the New York Mets, acquiring LHP Richard Lovelady for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, outlasting their opponents in a closely contested 8-7 final score. Marcell Ozuna led the Nationals' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Giants Shut Out Reds 3-0**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a shutout victory over the Cincinnati Reds, winning 3-0. Landen Roupp led the Giants' pitching effort, throwing 6.0 innings with 6 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Thrilling 9-10 Loss to Tigers**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Kansas City Royals 9-10 in a back-and-forth game. Salvador Perez led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Angels Soar Past Yankees 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dominated the New York Yankees in a decisive 11-4 victory. Jo Adell led the Angels' offense with a grand slam and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Place McKinstry on Injured List**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have placed third baseman Zach McKinstry on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 16, 2026, due to left hip and abdominal inflammation.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers made a move on April 16, 2026, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott in a trade with the Baltimore Orioles.
